title: ResearchIntent
description: The scoping intent for a prompt-engineering dossier (agency/capabilities/prompt/ontology.py; Spec 153 Slice 6 — prompt-dossier wave). Records the seed query, topic, and desired deliverable form before the dossier is rendered. Links RENDERS_FROM←ResearchBrief.

seed_query.description: The initial free-form query or topic statement that seeds the dossier research.

topic.description: Normalised topic extracted from seed_query — used as the dossier's primary subject.

deliverable.description: Target deliverable format for the dossier output.
